Class Goal

java.lang.Object
com.fakkaflow.data.model.Goal
public class Goal extends Object
Represents a financial goal for a user. Tracks saving progress toward a target amount within a deadline.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Goal()
    Default constructor.
    Goal(int userId, String name, float targetAmount, float savedAmount, String deadline)
    Creates a new financial goal.

  • Constructor Details

    • Goal

      public Goal()
      Default constructor.

    • Goal

      public Goal(int userId, String name, float targetAmount, float savedAmount, String deadline)
      Creates a new financial goal.
      Parameters:
      userId - ID of the user
      name - goal name
      targetAmount - target amount to reach
      savedAmount - initial saved amount
      deadline - deadline of the goal

    • getRemaining

      public float getRemaining()
      Calculates the remaining amount needed to reach the goal.
